/usr/bin/c++  -fPIC -fpermissive CMakeFiles/E15_robot_state_client.dir/example/E15/E15_robot_state_client.cpp.o -o E15_robot_state_client  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/liblcm.so ../lib/libyobotics_sdk.a -lpthread -Wl,--start-group ../lib/libyobotics_sdk.a /usr/local/lib/liblcm.so -Wl,--end-group -lpthread
